s:
Pilldroid is a theoretical medication stock manager.
<em>It's in french and uses
d:
• Why for french people only? Pilldroid uses a prescription database from the French government website, with prescriptions which are refund by french health care national insurance (Sécurité Sociale).
  • What is Pilldroid's license? Pilldroid is distributed under the BSD 3-Clause revised license
